title: Decision No. 80 of 2025 Amending Order No. 48 of 2022 Regarding Data Subject Rights
summary: Introduces an additional right within the framework of Decision No. 48 of 2022, reported as a data portability-related amendment, but the exact official issue date was not verified from an opened source.

theme_notes.data_privacy.personal_data_protection: Adds a new provision to the data subject rights decision.
